name: superhuman
description: Autonomous open-source contribution workflow for Claude Code and Codex

superpowers.reason: planner wraps superpowers:writing-plans; builder wraps superpowers:subagent-driven-development

everything-claude-code.reason: reviewer-dispatcher dispatches python/go/typescript/java/kotlin/rust/cpp/csharp/flutter/security reviewers from this plugin; falls back to inline prompts if missing
